differentials.name: Remove collimator + replace with lead ring
differentials.raw: Remove collimator + replace with lead ring (to eliminate edge packing)

differentials.name: Place a point source at a distance of at least 5 crystal diameters from detector
differentials.raw: Place a point source at a distance of at least 5 crystal diameters from detector (4-5 feet for small, 7-9 feet for large crystals)

differentials.name: Point source contains 200-400 µCi of 99mTc for minimal personnel exposure
differentials.raw: Point source contains 200-400 µCi of 99mTc for minimal personnel exposure (avoid contamination of crystal)

differentials.name: Set count rate below limit of instrument
differentials.raw: Set count rate below limit of instrument (< 30,000 counts)

differentials.name: Adjust the pulse height selector to normal window settings by centering at 140 keV with a window of 15%
differentials.raw: Adjust the pulse height selector to normal window settings by centering at 140 keV with a window of 15% (for 99mTc studies only)

differentials.name: Acquire 1.25 million counts for a 10" field of view, 2.5 million counts for a 15" field of view
differentials.raw: Acquire 1.25 million counts for a 10" field of view, 2.5 million counts for a 15" field of view

differentials.name: Register counts, time, CRT intensity, analyzer settings, initials of controller
differentials.raw: Register counts, time, CRT intensity, analyzer settings, initials of controller
